scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npx wait-on -t 45000 http://localhost:3001 && npm run dev:frontend" "npx wait-on -t 60000 http://localhost:5173 && open http://localhost:5173"
scripts.dev:no-open: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npx wait-on -t 45000 http://localhost:3001 && npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend:fresh: cd backend && (lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9) 2>/dev/null; npx prisma generate && node src/index.js
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
